feedback.text: Its incredibly unfair that game companies can change the rules of ownership after people have already paid for a product. Players buy a game expecting to own it, yet publishers can later take away the ability to play it entirely. Its like buying a car, only for the manufacturer to remotely disable the engine after a couple of years so you have to buy their newest model. Most people would consider that completely unethical. Thats essentially whats happening with many video games.
